category_sources: Official site https://picoruby.org describes PicoRuby as the smallest Ruby implementation for one-chip microcontrollers.
source_facts.description says "Smallest Ruby implementation for microcontrollers".
display_name_sources: Official site https://picoruby.org uses the display name PicoRuby.
docs_sources: Official source repository README at https://github.com/picoruby/picoruby is a secondary documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/picoruby/picoruby, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official site https://picoruby.org documents microcontroller products including R2P2 and PicoRuby.wasm.
